diagnosis.final_diagnosis: malignant migrating partial seizures in infancy (MMPSI)
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was based on electroclinical symptoms, including the pattern of ictal discharges which originated successively from one area of the brain to another, and the manifestation of seizures as lateral eye deviation, blinking, chewing, drooling, and flushing, as well as seizures with elevation of one arm, clonic jerks of the arm and leg, and cyanosis.
